name: One Stop Money Shop
description_short: One Stop Money Shop is a cash advance and loan services provider located in Memphis, TN, established in 2011, offering emergency financial solutions.
description_long:
One Stop Money Shop has operated since 2011 as a cash advance and loan services provider in Memphis, Tennessee. The company is physically located at 2600 Poplar Ave in Memphis's midtown area, near major banking institutions and commercial corridors. The business is categorized as an emergency-cash lender, which typically includes payday loans, title loans, and other short-term credit products designed for immediate financial needs.

Based on their categorization as a 'Cash Advance and Loan Services' provider, One Stop Money Shop appears to offer emergency lending solutions for consumers needing fast access to funds. These services typically include payday advances, title-based loans, and similar short-term financial products. The company's establishment date of 2011 indicates over a decade of operation in the Memphis market.

The company maintains a local storefront presence at their Poplar Avenue location, distinguishing them from online-only lenders. Their phone contact line (901-347-3103) provides direct access to customer service. The business appears in local business directories as an established service provider in the Memphis area, competing alongside other regional and national emergency lending services.

Limitations in publicly available information include the absence of specific APR rates, loan terms, fee structures, and customer reviews on their listing. The company's website field is listed as 'bp.com,' which appears to be a data error and does not reflect an actual company website. Hours of operation are not documented, requiring direct contact. This lack of transparency in online presence and documented terms makes independent verification of their specific offerings and pricing difficult.
pros: Established local business since 2011 with over 10 years operating history in Memphis
Physical storefront location at 2600 Poplar Ave provides in-person access
Direct phone contact available at 901-347-3103 for customer inquiries
Located in accessible midtown Memphis area near Union Avenue corridor
Listed among 99+ cash advance providers in Memphis area, indicating market presence
cons: No public website or online presence documented; listed website 'bp.com' is incorrect
No customer reviews, ratings, or testimonials available on business listing
Operating hours not listed—customers must call to determine availability
No publicly available information on APR rates, fees, loan terms, or eligibility requirements
Minimal transparency regarding specific loan products, maximum loan amounts, or repayment terms
best_for: Memphis-area residents needing in-person access to emergency cash advances
Consumers preferring face-to-face interactions over online lending platforms
Local borrowers with established relationships or familiarity with the business
diagnosis: One Stop Money Shop is best suited for Memphis residents seeking immediate emergency cash with in-person service access. The primary caveat is the near-complete lack of transparent, publicly available information regarding rates, terms, fees, and specific products—requiring direct contact for any meaningful evaluation.
